## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Related Issues

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Testing Done

- [ ] Tested locally — application starts and runs without errors
- [ ] Verified the fix / feature works end-to-end in the UI
- [ ] Tested with SQLite backend
- [ ] Tested with a network database backend (PostgreSQL / MySQL) if applicable
- [ ] UI changes tested on target screen resolution

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing project conventions (PEP 8, naming, structure)
- [ ] No debug `print()` statements left in the code
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed (files in `docs/`)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] No new linter warnings introduced
